description: India Book (IB), II, 69a. Panegyric in Honor of Madmun II Cairo, after 1186. The author seems to have been in dire straits and unable to pay the poll tax, and he wrote panegyrical poems to a number of notables, including Maimonides, in order to request help from them. Other drafts of the panegyric on IB, 69b (PGPID 5420).
description_he: ספר הודו II,69א: פאנגיריק לכבוד מדמון השני, מאת מחבר שנזקק לעזרה בתשלום מס גולגולת
